summary: The diff implements a comprehensive visual redesign of the Khudrang Kalakaar portfolio website covering all required sections. All 11 requirements appear to be addressed: Navigation, HeroSection, AboutSection, ServicesSection, FeaturedProjects/ProjectSection, ArtworkGallery, WhyChooseSection, ContactSection, QRSection, Footer, and global CSS/Tailwind config have been redesigned with a warm artisanal terracotta/cream/charcoal theme using Playfair Display and Inter fonts. Existing functionality (double-tap easter egg, WhatsApp links, backend data fetching) is preserved throughout. No significant missing requirements or hallucinated features are identified.
